title: BreakTheFall
description: "BreakTheFall" is a Minecraft mod that lets players land on leaves without taking fall damage, adding a new level of strategy and exploration to the game.
body:
Brought from Curse & PMC with over 13k Downloads brought to the Modrinth Community!

(1.20.1 Now Downloadable!)
(2.0 Update : Now compatible with Modded Leaves that doesn't change the NBT :leaves)

"BreakTheFall" is a game-changing Minecraft mod that revolutionizes the mechanics of fall damage by allowing players to land safely on any type of "leaves" without taking any harm. By removing the fear of falling from great heights, this mod opens up new strategic avenues and enhances exploration possibilities, empowering players to confidently navigate and explore the vast Minecraft world with ease and freedom.

(You may add this to any Modpacks / Videos!)

- Do not upload this to any other mod website without permission of the Author (JTMessenger) However feel free to use it in any Modpack or Server! Join the Discord for any questions about this mod or be updated with the latest!

Showcase of BreakTheFall 2.0
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BTTOqB6Upp4

Socials https://linktr.ee/jtmessenger

-=-
